sentence: 那艘巡洋舰正在执行巡逻任务。
pinyin: Nà sōu xúnyángjiàn zhèngzài zhíxíng xúnluó rènwù.
english: That cruiser is currently carrying out a patrol mission.

sentence: 实验室里摆满了各种试管。
pinyin: Shíyànshì lǐ bǎi mǎnle gè zhǒng shìguǎn.
english: The laboratory is filled with all kinds of test tubes.

sentence: 这个电路需要加一个电感来滤波。
pinyin: Zhège diànlù xūyào jiā yī gè diàngǎn lái lǜbō.
english: This circuit needs an inductor added to filter the signal.

sentence: 他在大学选修了密码学课程。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiūle mìmǎxué kèchéng.
english: He took a cryptography course as an elective at university.

meaning: 1. to disembark; 2. to off-load cargo; 3. to uninstall (software)
sentence: 手机内存不够了，先卸载几个不常用的软件吧。
pinyin: Shǒujī nèicún bù gòu le, xiān xièzài jǐ gè bù cháng yòng de ruǎnjiàn ba.
english: The phone storage is running low; let's first uninstall a few rarely-used apps.

sentence: 海边种了一排高大的棕榈树。
pinyin: Hǎibiān zhòngle yī pái gāodà de zōnglǘ shù.
english: A row of tall palm trees were planted along the seaside.

sentence: 我姑妈每年春节都会来我们家。
pinyin: Wǒ gūmā měi nián chūnjié dōu huì lái wǒmen jiā.
english: My paternal aunt comes to our house every Lunar New Year.

meaning: 1. to join; 2. to meet; 3. to copulate; 4. sexual intercourse
sentence: 两条河流在此处交合，形成一片湿地。
pinyin: Liǎng tiáo héliú zài cǐchù jiāohé, xíngchéng yī piàn shīdì.
english: Two rivers meet here, forming a wetland area.

sentence: 工厂将利润用于再生产，扩大规模。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng jiāng lìrùn yòng yú zàishēngchǎn, kuòdà guīmó.
english: The factory uses its profits for reproduction to expand its scale.

sentence: 这个网络图中有十个结点。
pinyin: Zhège wǎngluò tú zhōng yǒu shí gè jiédiǎn.
english: There are ten nodes in this network diagram.

sentence: 双眼视差让我们能感知物体的深度。
pinyin: Shuāngyǎn shìchā ràng wǒmen néng gǎnzhī wùtǐ de shēndù.
english: Binocular parallax allows us to perceive the depth of objects.

sentence: 写对话时别忘了加引号。
pinyin: Xiě duìhuà shí bié wàngle jiā yǐnhào.
english: Don't forget to add quotation marks when writing dialogue.

sentence: 这个国家的外债总额已经很高了。
pinyin: Zhège guójiā de wàizhài zǒng'é yǐjīng hěn gāo le.
english: This country's total foreign debt is already very high.

sentence: 他通过买卖期权获利不少。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò mǎimài qīquán huòlì bù shǎo.
english: He made quite a profit by trading options.

sentence: 很多年轻人选择住在城市周边的卫星城。
pinyin: Hěn duō niánqīngrén xuǎnzé zhù zài chéngshì zhōubiān de wèixīngchéng.
english: Many young people choose to live in satellite towns on the outskirts of the city.

sentence: 他通过考试成为一名司法官。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò kǎoshì chéngwéi yī míng sīfǎguān.
english: He passed the exam and became a judicial officer.

meaning: 1. (of troops) to depart for; 2. to head for
sentence: 部队明天将开赴边境执行任务。
pinyin: Bùduì míngtiān jiāng kāifù biānjìng zhíxíng rènwù.
english: The troops will depart for the border tomorrow to carry out their mission.

sentence: 老师准备了很多教具帮助学生理解。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zhǔnbèi le hěn duō jiàojù bāngzhù xuésheng lǐjiě.
english: The teacher prepared many teaching aids to help students understand.

sentence: 下半场他们进了两个球。
pinyin: Xià bàncháng tāmen jìn le liǎng gè qiú.
english: They scored two goals in the second half.

sentence: 所有获奖者将在台上领奖。
pinyin: Suǒyǒu huòjiǎngzhě jiāng zài tái shàng lǐng jiǎng.
english: All prizewinners will receive their awards on stage.

meaning: 1. pathological changes; 2. lesion; 3. diseased (kidney, cornea etc)
sentence: 检查发现他肺部有病变。
pinyin: Jiǎnchá fāxiàn tā fèibù yǒu bìngbiàn.
english: The examination revealed a lesion in his lungs.

sentence: 她举止优雅，是个淑女。
pinyin: Tā jǔzhǐ yōuyǎ, shì gè shūnǚ.
english: She has graceful manners and is a true lady.

sentence: 历史课讲到了极权政府的危害。
pinyin: Lìshǐ kè jiǎng dào le jíquán zhèngfǔ de wēihài.
english: The history class discussed the harms of totalitarian governments.

sentence: 医生说他有代谢综合征。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō tā yǒu dàixiè zōnghézhēng.
english: The doctor said he has metabolic syndrome.

meaning: 1. to harvest; 2. to reap; 3. to gather in crops
sentence: 农民们正在田里收割小麦。
pinyin: Nóngmínmen zhèngzài tián lǐ shōugē xiǎomài.
english: The farmers are harvesting wheat in the fields.

sentence: 双方达成了实质性的协议。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng dáchéng le shízhìxìng de xiéyì.
english: Both sides reached a substantive agreement.

sentence: 工厂附近的环境污染越来越严重。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng fùjìn de huánjìng wūrǎn yuèláiyuè yánzhòng.
english: Environmental pollution near the factory is getting worse and worse.

sentence: 飞机的机翼在阳光下闪闪发光。
pinyin: Fēijī de jīyì zài yángguāng xià shǎnshǎn fāguāng.
english: The aircraft's wings gleamed in the sunlight.

meaning: 1. to go home (to one's native country); 2. to return from abroad
sentence: 她留学五年后终于归国了。
pinyin: Tā liúxué wǔ nián hòu zhōngyú guīguó le.
english: She finally returned to her home country after studying abroad for five years.

sentence: 这种药剂需要饭后服用。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yàojì xūyào fàn hòu fúyòng.
english: This medicine needs to be taken after meals.

sentence: 他每天早上都会作画放松心情。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang dōu huì zuòhuà fàngsōng xīnqíng.
english: He paints every morning to relax.

sentence: 她在花园里喷了一些杀虫剂。
pinyin: Tā zài huāyuán lǐ pēn le yīxiē shāchóngjì.
english: She sprayed some insecticide in the garden.

sentence: 孩子们在学习计数到一百。
pinyin: Háizimen zài xuéxí jìshù dào yībǎi.
english: The children are learning to count to one hundred.

meaning: 1. secondly; 2. the other (usu. of two); 3. the second
sentence: 原因其二是天气太差。
pinyin: Yuányīn qí èr shì tiānqì tài chà.
english: The second reason is that the weather was too bad.

meaning: 1. to buy frenetically; 2. to snap up (bargains, dwindling supplies et
sentence: 超市打折，大家都去抢购。
pinyin: Chāoshì dǎzhé, dàjiā dōu qù qiǎnggòu.
english: The supermarket had a sale and everyone rushed to snap up goods.

sentence: 这次活动的组织者做得非常好。
pinyin: Zhè cì huódòng de zǔzhīzhě zuò de fēicháng hǎo.
english: The organizer of this event did an excellent job.

meaning: 1. to condense; 2. to solidify; 3. to coagulate; 4. clot (of blood)
sentence: 冷空气让水蒸气凝结成小水珠。
pinyin: Lěng kōngqì ràng shuǐzhēngqì níngjié chéng xiǎo shuǐzhū.
english: Cold air causes water vapor to condense into tiny droplets.

meaning: 1. to affect; 2. to produce a change in sth
sentence: 这件事牵动了很多人的心。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì qiāndòng le hěn duō rén de xīn.
english: This matter touched the hearts of many people.

sentence: 科学家研究了子弹的弹道轨迹。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā yánjiū le zǐdàn de dàndào guǐjì.
english: Scientists studied the ballistic trajectory of the bullet.

meaning: 1. to investigate a crime on the spot; 2. to occur (of a crime); 3. to
sentence: 警察在案发后一小时赶到现场。
pinyin: Jǐngchá zài ànfā hòu yī xiǎoshí gǎndào xiànchǎng.
english: Police arrived at the scene one hour after the crime occurred.

sentence: 跨年夜大家互祝新年快乐。
pinyin: Kuànián yè dàjiā hù zhù Xīnnián kuàilè.
english: On New Year's Eve, everyone wished each other Happy New Year.

sentence: 这部剧里的王爷性格很好。
pinyin: Zhè bù jù lǐ de wángyé xìnggé hěn hǎo.
english: The prince in this drama has a very good personality.

sentence: 她把头发染色成深棕色。
pinyin: Tā bǎ tóufa rǎnsè chéng shēn zōngsè.
english: She dyed her hair a dark brown color.

sentence: 他不相信那些阴谋论。
pinyin: Tā bù xiāngxìn nàxiē yīnmóulùn.
english: He doesn't believe in those conspiracy theories.

sentence: 他准时到咖啡馆赴约。
pinyin: Tā zhǔnshí dào kāfēiguǎn fùyuē.
english: He arrived at the café on time to keep his appointment.

meaning: 1. facial mask; 2. cleanser; 3. face pack; 4. facial (treatment)
sentence: 她每周敷两次面膜护肤。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu fū liǎng cì miànmó hùfū.
english: She applies a facial mask twice a week for skincare.

sentence: 雨季来临，出门记得带伞。
pinyin: Yǔjì láilín, chūmén jìde dài sǎn.
english: The rainy season has arrived — remember to bring an umbrella when you go out.

sentence: 他们参加了一个五天的旅行团。
pinyin: Tāmen cānjiā le yī gè wǔ tiān de lǚxíngtuán.
english: They joined a five-day tour group.

sentence: 新任区长今天正式上任。
pinyin: Xīn rèn qūzhǎng jīntiān zhèngshì shàngrèn.
english: The new district chief officially took office today.

sentence: 他在包里摸到某物，掏出来一看是钥匙。
pinyin: Tā zài bāo lǐ mō dào mǒuwù, tāo chūlái yī kàn shì yàoshi.
english: He felt something in his bag and pulled it out — it was his key.
